raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I booked a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX using my American Express credit card. Despite arriving at the gate on time and having checked in my baggage, I was denied boarding. The airline incorrectly marked my ticket as a " no-show, '' even though I was present and attempted to board. My checked baggage was also not loaded onto the flight. 

Following the denial of boarding, I contacted XXXX XXXX to request a refund under the U.S. Department of Transportations 24-hour reservation rule, which entitles passengers to a full refund if a booking is canceled within 24 hours. XXXX refused to process the refund, citing the incorrect " no-show '' status. 

I then disputed the charge with American Express, explaining the circumstances and providing supporting documentation, including proof of my presence at the gate and the airlines refusal to resolve the issue. However, American Express declined my dispute and failed to assist in securing a refund. 

The total ticket cost was [ $ Amount Paid ], which XXXX has refused to refund despite their error. This denial has caused significant financial loss and inconvenience. 
Actions Taken by Me : 1. Contacted XXXX XXXX to request a refund and dispute the " no-show '' status. 
2. Filed a charge dispute with American Express, providing documentation of the incident. 
3. Attempted to resolve the matter directly with XXXX and American Express, without success. 

Desired Resolution : I request assistance from the CFPB to secure : 1. A full refund of the ticket cost from XXXX XXXX. 
2. A review of American Expresss handling of my dispute and a reconsideration of their decision. 

This situation highlights a failure to protect consumer rights, and I believe further intervention is necessary to resolve this matter.
